items.title: Microsoft’s stock selloff is approaching a critical crossroads unseen in over 10 years
items.description: Shares of Microsoft are less than 3% above their 200-week moving average, which has provided key technical support in the past.

items.title: Why more CEOs are chatting directly with customers
items.description: Executives say it’s all about learning how to better run their businesses, but some corporate watchers question if this is just a PR move.

items.title: Constellation Energy’s stock zooms toward highest level in weeks, even after outlook is postponed
items.description: Constellation Energy is keeping investors waiting for its yearly guidance, saying it will provide it in March. But that hasn’t dented the independent ...

items.title: 9 of the stock market’s 10 most-watched valuation indicators are now in ‘sell’ territory
items.description: Indicators are at extremes — stretched valuations are bearish for stocks.

items.title: Stop muzzling the 1%: The wealthy have a right to free speech — and democracy needs billionaires
items.description: Bashing the rich won’t fix inequality — it simply gives power to elites who already control the agenda.
